import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint"

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate"

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Get Trusted OAuth2 JWT Bearer Grant Type Issuer"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/admin/trust/grants/jwt-bearer/issuers/{id}"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

Use this endpoint to get a trusted JWT Bearer Grant Type Issuer. The ID is the one returned when you created the trust
relationship.

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
